title: Zibas Miel y Mostaza Crispy Chicken Bites
ingredients: 2 cups cooked or raw ground or finely chopped chicken
1 bag of Ziba's Miel y Mostaza chips for serving
instructions: Step 1. In a bowl, mix the chicken with the egg, breadcrumbs, Parmesan cheese, onion, garlic, salt, pepper, paprika, and mustard until you get a manageable mixture. If too soft, add a bit more breadcrumbs.
Step 2. Take small portions and shape into walnut-sized balls.
Step 3. Roll them first in flour, then in beaten egg, and finally in breadcrumbs, pressing lightly to adhere well.
Step 4. Place them in the air fryer basket without overcrowding. Lightly spray with cooking oil.
Step 5. Cook at 190 °C (375 °F) for 10 to 12 minutes, turning halfway through, until golden brown, crispy on the outside, and cooked through.
Step 6. Once ready, lightly toss the bites with the mild BBQ sauce or serve it on the side.
Step 7. Serve hot with Ziba's Miel y Mostaza chips for dipping.
description: Super crispy on the outside and juicy on the inside chicken bites, breaded and cooked in an air fryer. Tossed in BBQ sauce and perfect for dipping with Ziba's Miel y Mostaza chips.
